zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Woodford於1389年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯時，她的父親John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince31歲，母親Mabelle De Folville33歲。她於1404年2月之前與Sir Lawrence Berkeley在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年在她的家鄉享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Woodford于1389年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯时，她的父亲John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince31岁，母亲Mabelle De Folville33岁。她于1404年2月之前与Sir Lawrence Berkeley在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年在她的家乡享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Woodford in Cheshire, Cornwall, Essex, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire. In Scotland, the name is derived from Woodford in Saint Boswells (Roxburghshire).
History: Thomas Woodford emigrated from Lincolnshire, England, to NY in 1690.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Woodford was born in 1389, in Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England, her father, John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince, was 31 and her mother, Mabelle De Folville, was 33. She married Sir Lawrence Berkeley before February 1404, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1417, in her hometown, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Woodford est née en 1389, à Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mabelle De Folville, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lawrence Berkeley avant février 1404, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1417, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Woodford 1389 in Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince 31 und ihre Mutter Mabelle De Folville 33. Sie hat vor Februar 1404 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England Sir Lawrence Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Woodford è nata il nel 1389 nel Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mabelle De Folville, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Lawrence Berkeley prima del febbraio 1404, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1417, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Woodfordが1389年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルトン ラザルズで生まれた時，父John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Princeは31歳，母Mabelle De Folvilleは33歳であった。1404年2月以前にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでSir Lawrence Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年に故郷で28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Woodford(이)가 1389년 영국 레이스스터실르 버턴 라자르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabelle De Folville(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1404년 2월 이전 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Sir Lawrence Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Woodford nasceu em 1389, em Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mabelle De Folville, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lawrence Berkeley antes fevereiro de 1404, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1417, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Woodford родилась в 1389 г. в местности буртон лазарс, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mabelle De Folville, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lawrence Berkeley перед февраль 1404 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1417 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Woodford nació en 1389, en Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mabelle De Folville, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir Lawrence Berkeley antes de febrero de 1404, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1417, en su pueblo, a la edad de 28 años.
